title: map #{} keys num/str
manager: A map/dictionary `#{k: v}` with numeric or string keys, for the associative lookups every non-trivial machine eventually needs — a routing table, a per-key counter, a name-to-config binding. Keyed access returns an option, so a miss is a value you handle rather than a crash, and the whole structure is value-equal and serializable so it replays with the rest of the state.
cs: map type + `#{ }` literal; num/str keys; get->option (W6.22); value equality; container protocol (W6.43).
